_doc: Domain pack for go-stablenet — the reference instance of the domain-pack contract (ADR docs/domain-pack-contract-adr-2026-06-22.md). Phase 1 wires identity + invariants + context_classifier only (ADR §8 Q2); build/unit_test/verification_stages are declared under _phase2 but NOT yet consumed (evaluator generalization is Phase 2). Resolved at runtime via the generic `domain-pack` loader skill keyed by state.project_id.

knowledge._note: domain knowledge lives in this project's cks index (guidance.* / policy/stablenet.yaml / domain entries); the pack carries only the search-independent backstop + path classifier

_phase2._doc: Declared contract shape for Phase 2 (evaluator data-driven stages); NOT consumed yet.
